title: Anthropic Set Fable 5 Free Access Window And Usage Credit Requirement
summary: Anthropic's June 9 announcement says Claude Fable 5 is available to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plan users, with Max, Team, and Enterprise access included through June 22, 2026 and usage credits required starting June 23, 2026.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: usage credits required after the included-access window ends on 2026-06-22

impacts.recommended_action: Budget Fable 5 usage credits before June 23, 2026 and avoid assuming Max plan access remains included after the free-access window.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: usage credits required after the included-access window ends on 2026-06-22

impacts.recommended_action: Update team rollout plans and budget approvals before broad Fable 5 adoption after June 22, 2026.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: usage credits required after the included-access window ends on 2026-06-22

impacts.recommended_action: Confirm enterprise usage-credit terms with the account owner before making Fable 5 the default for internal or customer-facing workflows.
Treat Pro-plan Fable 5 access as limited daily capacity and keep fallback model routes available for repeated or long-running tasks.

entitlement_changes: Claude Fable 5 access is listed for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plan users.
Max, Team, and Enterprise access is included through 2026-06-22 and requires usage credits starting 2026-06-23.
Pro users have limited daily access.
detail.new_terms: Fable 5 access varies by Anthropic subscription plan; Max, Team, and Enterprise users need usage credits after the included-access window, and Pro users receive limited daily access.

limitations: APW records subscription-access facts from the official announcement, not account-specific contract terms.
This event does not assert API, cloud-provider, or regional access terms for Fable 5.
